mailingAddress.street: 1 Cheonji Hanmaru, Mount Baekdu Sky Pavilion

roles.name: Loremaster of the Cheonbu-gyeong
roles.description: Keeper of the Heavenly Seal scriptures — designs the over-arching solution and guards its integrity across the spheres.

roles.name: Hwarang Captain
roles.description: Leads the Hwarang flower-knights of delivery — holds the timeline and answers to the council.

roles.name: Keeper of the Royal Annals
roles.description: Steward of the Joseon-style records — layouts, fields, profiles and permission sets.

roles.name: Master Smith of Gaya Iron
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC and platform features in the iron furnaces of old Gimhae.

roles.name: Yangban Practice Lord
roles.description: Yangban scholar-noble overseeing all Salesforce craft for the Western court — sets standards for the senior smiths.

roles.name: Senior Hwarang of Silla
roles.description: Veteran flower-knight who patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Hwarang Initiate
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Senior Hwarang's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of the Eunhasu
roles.description: Architect of the great spans across the Milky Way — Salesforce to the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-builder of the Eunhasu
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware and event flows under the Bridge-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Magpie Bridge
roles.description: Learns the craft of webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of error handling on the Ojakgyo.

roles.name: Eumyangsa Quality Inspector
roles.description: Tests the harmony of yin and yang in every release — finds the maladies before they reach the throne.

roles.name: Pungmul Herald
roles.description: Lifts the pungmul drum and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Pansori Storyteller
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the pansori chant to gather and convert.

roles.name: Janggu Drummer
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative and the daily rhythm.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Seokguram
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the carved grotto of design.

roles.name: Senior Master Smith of Pohang
roles.description: Master of the great Pohang forges — owns the most critical Apex foundations and mentors the smiths of Gaya.

roles.name: Sodang Apprentice
roles.description: Sodang village-school newcomer — learns flows, layouts and reports under the Hwarang's wing.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Hwanin's Decree
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — Heavenly Lord stamps the project charter.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Descent of Hwanung
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Build kickoff: 3,000 followers descend Mount Taebaek to begin construction.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Sandalwood Council
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Mid-project gate: review beneath the Sindansu sacred tree.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Sun & Moon Invoice
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: Daebyeol-wang and Sobyeol-wang split the heavens.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Founding of Gojoseon
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Go-Live: Dangun establishes the first kingdom.

creation-and-heaven-gods.name: Mago's Hand-off
creation-and-heaven-gods.description: Hyper-care close: creation passed to mortal stewardship.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Mountain Spirit Awakening
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: Project kickoff: Sansin rises from Mount Jiri to bless the build.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Raising the Jangseung
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: Build phase: totem poles set at every village gate.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Seonangdang Acceptance
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: UAT gate: village shrine accepts the new system.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Eobshin Treasure Reveal
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: Go-Live: fortune snake unveils the harvest dashboard.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Hearth Hand-off
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: Hyper-care close: Jowangshin takes the kitchen reins.

mountain-and-village-spirits.name: Village Tribute Invoice
mountain-and-village-spirits.description: Final invoice: rice and grain delivered to the shrine.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Bak Hyeokgeose Hatches
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Discovery: Silla's founder emerges from the radiant egg.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Jumong's Bow Strung
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Build: Goguryeo's archer-king draws the first arrow.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Onjo's Court Review
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Solution review with the founder of Baekje.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Heo Hwang-ok Lands at Gimhae
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Go-Live: the Ayodhya princess arrives and weds Kim Suro.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Pyeonggang's Hand-off
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Project close: the princess transitions Ondal to steady-state.

heroes-of-myth-and-legend.name: Three Kingdoms Tribute
heroes-of-myth-and-legend.description: Final invoice from the unified founder-court.

dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.name: Yeomra Convenes the Court
dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.description: Kickoff: the King of the Underworld opens the ledger.

dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.name: Saja Dispatch Network Online
dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.description: Discovery: death messengers routed to every province.

dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.name: Dokkaebi Bangmangi Forged
dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.description: Build: enchanted clubs distributed for nightly mischief.

dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.name: Tenth Court Acceptance
dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.description: UAT acceptance: each soul tested through all ten tribunals.

dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.name: Bari Gongju's Crossing
dokkaebi-spirits-and-underworld.description: Go-Live + handoff: Princess Bari ferries souls to rebirth.

Hwanin.notes: Quarterly retreat in the highest sky pavilion — uncontactable.

Hwanung.notes: Mount Taebaek pilgrimage — leading 3,000 followers down again.

Dangun.notes: Founding-day ceremony at Manisan altar — annual obligation.

Mago.notes: Recreation work — re-shaping a continent, takes a week.

Jumong.notes: Archery tournament at Goguryeo — defending title.

Princess Pyeonggang.notes: Coaching Ondal at home — no court duties.

Ondal the Fool.notes: Riding lessons with the princess — full immersion week.

Heo Hwang-ok.notes: Voyage from Ayodhya — long sea crossing.

Dokkaebi.notes: Ssireum wrestling festival — challenging humans for fun.

Princess Bari.notes: Pilgrimage to fetch the water of life — overdue.

Saja.notes: Black hat re-blocking — once a year only.
